name: PATRICK INDUSTRIES INC
business: Patrick Industries, Inc. is a leading component solutions provider for the recreational vehicle (RV), marine, powersports, manufactured housing (MH) and various industrial markets including single and multi-family housing, hospitality, institutional and commercial markets. The company manufactures and distributes a variety of products within its Manufacturing and Distribution segments, and operates through a nationwide network of approximately 191 manufacturing plants and 50 warehouse and distribution facilities. Net sales for the year ended December 31, 2025 were $3.95 billion.
sellsTo: Industrial customers (residential housing, hospitality, institutional, commercial)

exposures.sentence: Purchases of property, plant, and equipment for 2025 consisted of $83 million of investments which were primarily used to provide more advanced manufacturing automation and replace and upgrade production equipment.

The Company operates within two reportable segments, Manufacturing and Distribution, through a nationwide network of manufacturing and distribution centers for its products, thereby reducing in-transit delivery time and cost to the regional manufacturing footprint of its customers.
Our industrial products are generally among the last components installed in new unit construction and as such our related sales typically trail new housing starts by four to six months.

tamClaims.claim: According to the RV Industry Association (RVIA), RV industry wholesale unit shipments totaled approximately 342,200 units in 2025
tamClaims.sentence: According to the RV Industry Association (RVIA), RV industry wholesale unit shipments totaled approximately 342,200 units in 2025

tamClaims.claim: According to Company estimates based on data published by the National Marine Manufacturers Association (NMMA), wholesale powerboat unit shipments totaled approximately 140,100 units in 2025
tamClaims.sentence: According to Company estimates based on data published by the National Marine Manufacturers Association ("NMMA"), wholesale powerboat unit shipments totaled approximately 140,100 units in 2025

tamClaims.claim: Based on industry data from the Manufactured Housing Institute, MH industry wholesale unit shipments totaled 102,700 units in 2025
tamClaims.sentence: Based on industry data from the Manufactured Housing Institute, MH industry wholesale unit shipments totaled 102,700 units in 2025

tamClaims.claim: According to the National Marine Manufacturers Association (NMMA), per its 2024 U.S. Recreational Boating Statistical Abstract, total U.S. retail expenditures on boats, engines, accessories, and related costs fell 2.6% to $55.62 billion in 2024 compared to 2023
tamClaims.sentence: According to the National Marine Manufacturers Association (NMMA), per its 2024 U.S. Recreational Boating Statistical Abstract (the "Abstract"), total U.S. retail expenditures on boats, engines, accessories, and related costs fell 2.6% to $55.62 billion in 2024 compared to 2023.
